characters.name: Queen Terra
characters.description: The ant queen, largest ant in the colony, deep reddish-brown, wise ancient eyes, sits in the heart of the nest with a slightly iridescent wing remnant on her back
uniqueFeatures: LARGEST ant character — visibly much bigger than all other ants, massive abdomen
DEEP REDDISH-BROWN coloring — rich, warm wood-toned exoskeleton
WISE ANCIENT EYES — calm, knowing expression, seen a thousand seasons
IRIDESCENT WING REMNANT on her back — small shimmering stubs that catch the light like tiny rainbows, the mark of a founding queen
Regal posture — sits upright and still, surrounded by attendant workers
Largest head with smooth, polished-looking exoskeleton
characters.personality: Wise, warm, and regal — sits calmly and speaks with quiet authority, maternal and commanding
characters.notLike: NOT small or lean like Scout, NOT dark like Tiny, NOT aggressive-looking like Major

characters.name: Scout
characters.description: Explorer ant, lean and fast, lighter brown color, antennae always pointing forward alertly, one antenna slightly bent from an adventure
uniqueFeatures: LEAN and FAST build — longest legs proportionally, streamlined body
LIGHTER BROWN coloring — sandier, paler than Queen Terra's deep reddish-brown
ANTENNAE pointing FORWARD alertly — always sensing, always searching
ONE ANTENNA SLIGHTLY BENT — the left antenna has a noticeable crook from her first adventure, her signature feature
Front legs often raised — poised to run, ready for action
Alert, wide-eyed expression — always looking into the distance
characters.personality: Brave and curious — constantly exploring, front legs raised, leaning forward into the unknown
characters.notLike: NOT large like Queen Terra, NOT dark or small like Tiny, NOT bulky like Major

characters.name: Tiny
characters.description: Young worker ant, smallest of the group, darker color, eager to help but clumsy, always carries leaves twice her size
uniqueFeatures: SMALLEST ant character — noticeably smaller than all others, baby proportions
DARKER coloring — darker brown-black than the others, distinct from Scout's light brown
Always carrying something TOO BIG — signature look is struggling under an oversized leaf
ROUND, oversized head relative to body — baby-like proportions
Legs slightly splayed for balance — always wobbling, endearingly clumsy
Determined expression despite struggling — never gives up
characters.personality: Eager, determined, and adorably clumsy — always trying too hard, never giving up, heart of gold
characters.notLike: NOT lean like Scout, NOT large like Queen Terra, NOT intimidating like Major

characters.name: Major
characters.description: Soldier ant, biggest worker with oversized mandibles, dark reddish-black, stands guard at tunnel entrances, intimidating but gentle with colony-mates
uniqueFeatures: BIGGEST WORKER ant — second only to Queen Terra in size, but stockier and more muscular
MASSIVE HEAD with OVERSIZED MANDIBLES — enormous jaws that dominate his face
DARK REDDISH-BLACK coloring — darker and more intense than Queen Terra's warm brown
WIDE, planted stance — legs spread, blocking tunnel entrances, immovable
Gentle eyes that contrast with intimidating jaws — soft expression despite fearsome appearance
Thicker exoskeleton with visible armor-like plates on head
characters.personality: Powerful and protective but gentle — stands like an immovable guardian, speaks softly to colony-mates
characters.notLike: NOT lean like Scout, NOT small like Tiny, NOT regal like Queen Terra

step3.styleDescription:
Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Expressive character animation with large soulful eyes. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Professional children's book illustration quality. Cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill.

Emphasis on light passing through materials — translucent ears, glowing skin edges, light shining through leaves/water/ice. Subsurface scattering cranked up. Back-lit subjects with ethereal glow.

Rich botanical detail filling the frame — individually rendered leaves, visible bark texture, dewdrops on petals, moss on stones, flowers in full bloom. Nature as living wallpaper.
